label: Disable All Rounded Corners
description: Master toggle: disables ALL rounded corners across the entire browser UI.

label: Disable Web View Corners
description: Disable rounded corners on the web content area.

label: Disable Navbar Corners
description: Disable rounded corners on the navigation bar and URL bar.

label: Disable Sidebar Corners
description: Disable rounded corners on the sidebar.

label: Disable Popup/Menu Corners
description: Disable rounded corners on popups, menus, and panels.

label: Disable Button Corners
description: Disable rounded corners on toolbar buttons.

label: Disable Workspace Corners
description: Disable rounded corners on workspace buttons.

label: Disable Status Bar Corners
description: Disable rounded corners on the status bar and find bar.

label: Disable Compact Mode Corners
description: Disable rounded corners in compact mode.
